trades.reasoning: Full momentum stack (RSI 56.2, MACD bullish crossover, histogram rising, above SMA-20) with RSI in the ideal entry zone — not stretched — on a risk-on day favoring semiconductors.
Score 95 with RSI 57.9 and all bullish signals aligned; low share price allows meaningful position sizing with remaining cash and adds diversification away from crypto/mining names.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on tape today with NASDAQ outpacing the S&P 500 by 2x, a classic growth-favoring session. GLXY is already in the portfolio and still scoring 95 — holding. Deploying remaining cash into INTC and ADEA, both sitting in the sweet spot of the momentum range (RSI mid-to-high 50s) with clean technical setups, filling two of the four open slots.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied in risk-on fashion today, with growth and technology leading as the NASDAQ gained 1.2% versus a more modest 0.6% for the broader S&P 500. This divergence typically reflects investor confidence in higher-growth, higher-multiple companies — often fueled by easing rate expectations or strong earnings signals from tech bellwethers. Semiconductor names in particular showed broad strength, with multiple chip stocks appearing in top momentum screener results.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現風險偏好格局，成長股與科技股領漲，納斯達克指數上漲1.2%，表現明顯優於標普500指數的0.6%漲幅。這種分化走勢通常反映投資者對高成長、高估值企業的信心回升，往往與市場對聯準會降息預期升溫或科技龍頭企業財報表現強勁有關。半導體類股普遍走強，多檔晶片股在動能篩選器中名列前茅。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-on is when investors feel confident and willing to buy higher-risk, higher-reward assets like tech stocks and crypto. On these days, the NASDAQ typically outperforms the S&P 500 because it has more growth companies. It's the opposite of risk-off, when investors flee to safe havens like bonds and gold.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好」（Risk-On）是指投資者信心充足，願意買入科技股、加密貨幣等高風險、高報酬資產的市場狀態。在這類行情中，納斯達克指數的漲幅通常優於標普500，因為其成分股中成長型企業佔比更高。這與「風險規避」（Risk-Off）相反——後者是投資者轉向債券、黃金等避險資產的市況。
